facebook.caption:
POV: you took a tuk-tuk east and accidentally found the real Phu Quoc.

Hàm Ninh is a working fishing village, not a resort strip. Wooden stilts over the water. Crab pots stacked on the dock. Boats leaving before sunrise.

4.1 stars across 1,014 reviews. Most visitors say they wished they'd stayed longer.

Get here early. Beat the tour buses. Walk the pier alone.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Wooden piers, fishing boats, crab pots at your feet. This is Hàm Ninh and it looks nothing like the resort side of the island. East coast. Real life. Go.

instagram.caption:
Took a wrong turn east. Found Hàm Ninh. Wooden piers, fishing boats, zero resort energy.

4.1★ across 1,014 reviews. Go early.

Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Stilts over the water. Crab pots on the dock. Hàm Ninh hits different when the boats are heading out.

tiktok.caption: Skipped the resort beach and ended up here. Hàm Ninh fishing village slaps. #PhuQuoc #VietnamTravel #TravelTips #PhuQuocTips
